name: Top Movers Test
description: Test case for retrieving today's top 20 movers on Robinhood through agent interaction

parts.text: Show me today's top 20 movers on Robinhood.

Here are today's top 20 movers on Robinhood:

The list shows up to 20 stocks with the largest price movements today across all Robinhood-listed equities. Each entry includes the ticker symbol, company name, current price, and percentage change. These represent the most active and volatile names of the trading session.

**Note:** This is read-only market data. No orders were placed.
